title: Nepali Handwritten Character Recognition using CNN
short: Deep Learning based Nepali OCR system
description: A deep learning research project focused on recognizing 59 classes of Nepali handwritten characters using Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN). The project includes dataset preprocessing, model architecture design, training optimization, and detailed character-wise accuracy analysis using PyTorch.

title: Titanic Survival Prediction
description: A supervised machine learning model trained on the Titanic dataset to predict passenger survival. The project includes data cleaning, exploratory data analysis (EDA), feature engineering, and model training using Logistic Regression and other classifiers with performance evaluation metrics.

title: Fake News Detection using NLP
short: Text Classification with TF-IDF and Logistic Regression
description: An NLP-based text classification system designed to detect fake news headlines. The project applies text preprocessing techniques, TF-IDF vectorization, and Logistic Regression to classify news articles with performance evaluation and model comparison.

title: Iris Species Classification
description: A classical machine learning project that predicts Iris flower species using four numerical features. The model was implemented using Logistic Regression with proper data visualization, training-validation split, and accuracy evaluation.

title: Mini OTT Streaming Platform (Frontend)
description: A responsive OTT-style movie streaming frontend built using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. The project features dynamic movie cards, overlays, trailer previews, and modern UI design principles focused on user experience.
